title: Ripple
body:
# Ripple

**Makes particles react to entities.**

Ripple is a lightweight client-side mod that brings particles to life. Instead of floating passively, particles in the world actually respond to movement around them, scattering, shifting, and reacting naturally.

**Check out my other mod [Button Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/buttonanimations)**


<details>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JXrwUcpGvPo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Modpacks
Feel free to include Ripple in your modpack, no permission needed. But if you do, please let me know!


## Features
- Particles react to nearby movement
- Smooth and natural displacement
- Configurable radius and strength
- Config screen included (press B or use Mod Menu)
- Works with Sodium and Iris
- Client-side only, no server install needed


## Compatibility
- Fabric


If you find any issues make sure to report them on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Noslw/Ripple/issues).
